description_long: This handbag features a structured, rectangular silhouette with a deep navy blue base and a bold, abstract blue and white pattern on the front and back panels. The front flap is solid navy with a gold-toned metal clasp, adding a touch of sophistication. The bag is equipped with a single, medium-length brown leather strap attached by gold hardware, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear. The side profile reveals a slim, tapered design, making it sleek and easy to carry. The overall finish is matte with a slightly textured surface, and the bag appears to be made primarily of fabric with leather and metal accents. There are no visible brand logos or additional decorative elements beyond the patterned fabric and hardware.
description: A structured navy handbag with an abstract blue and white pattern, gold clasp, and a brown leather shoulder strap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the solid navy flap with a gold clasp and the patterned fabric beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the slim, tapered profile and the brown leather strap attached with gold hardware.
description_view_2: Back view displays the full abstract blue and white pattern and the brown strap spanning the width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the strap attachment and the bag's slim shape.
attribute_strap_type: Single medium-length brown leather shoulder strap, non-adjustable, attached with gold hardware at both ends.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Front flap with a gold-toned metal clasp closure located at the center of the flap.
attribute_pattern: Abstract blue and white pattern on navy background
